arts.ttl: Simon Jordan weighs in after hearing what Brendan Rodgers has said about Celtic fans' use of pyro
arts.sum: UEFA fined Celtic €20,000 and threatened to ban the club from selling tickets to away supporters for their next European fixture if the Hoops fans continue to use pyro in any of their competitions. Upon hearing that Jordan said on talkSPORT, “If indeed they want it stopped, for the reasons that we’ve discussed on numerous occasions, and whether people think it’s the fun police policing something that they enjoy doing.

arts.ttl: Cameron Carter Vickers ready to be Celtic colossus vs Atalanta as star man signals the green light
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers said he;d find out on Sunday if defender would be fit and it looks like he's heading to Bergamo

arts.ttl: Lille’s injury crisis worsens with Mitchel Bakker’s absence
arts.sum: Lille OSC have confirmed that they will be without summer signing Mitchel Bakker (24) for several weeks after he picked up an injury during the 0-0 draw with AS Monaco…

arts.ttl: Kyogo Furuhashi explains what he is 'looking forward to beat' for Celtic at Atalanta
arts.sum: As the fallout over the Aberdeen result continues, Kyogo and Celtic captain Callum McGregor have put the game behind them and have said that the team’s focus is now 100% on the Champions League fixture against Atalanta. Whilst it seems that Atalanta is not taking Celtic lightly, Rodgers knows he cannot afford another result that the Hoops suffered in Dortmund but Kyogo Furuhashi sounds bullish as he takes aim at the Italians ahead of Wednesday’s big game.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton says 'I worry' every time Celtic star doesn't start for Brendan Rodgers
arts.sum: There is hope Carter-Vickers will be back from injury pretty soon because Chris Sutton says it’s a ‘worry’ when he isn’t playing, as he told Sky Sports Football (20/10/24 at 11:15 am). Chris Sutton ‘worry’ when Cameron Carter-Vickers doesn’t start for Celtic

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist in 'agony' after hearing what Martin O'Neill said about Celtic and Rangers
arts.sum: Reacting to the weekend events, Martin O’Neill spoke about the gap between Celtic and Rangers which Ally McCoist admits even he found hard to hear. Celtic now sit six points clear of Rangers at the top of the Scottish Premiership table and after O’Neill said the Ibrox club are ‘really ordinary’, McCoist was asked by Jeff Stelling if this current team is the worst he’s ever seen.

arts.ttl: Celtic dwarfed by Atalanta's Champions League riches as Brendan Rodgers haunted by his ultimate transfer regret
arts.sum: It's another big chasm for the Scottish champions to overcome in Europe's elite competition

arts.ttl: Jamie McGrath ends Aberdeen handball goal at Celtic debate as he shares Duk's on-pitch reaction
arts.sum: 67 Hail Hail discussed yesterday how Des Roache believes Duk handled the ball to push home Aberdeen’s third goal of the game and how Dermot Gallagher also delivered his big Celtic Park VAR verdict. McGrath was asked about both of Duk’s handballs but shared what his Aberdeen teammate did after the ball hit the back of the net told him that he handled the ball.

arts.ttl: Gasperini and Retegui give Celtic much to ponder
arts.sum: Gian Piero Gasperini free-scoring Atalanta and top scorer Mateo Retegui pose a threat to Celtic's Champions League hopes, writes Alasdair Lamont.

arts.ttl: Martin Keown delivers 'better for Scottish football' claim after Celtic and Aberdeen debate
arts.sum: But Keown feels that Aberdeen challenging Celtic for the title is ‘better for Scottish football all-round’, as he told talkSPORT (21/10/24 at 11:55 am). Rangers and Celtic big games coming up in Europe.
